agentName.title: Name your project
agentName.description: This creates a project where your traces and experiments will live.
agentName.createError: Failed to create project. Please try again.

connectAgent.description: Connect your repo so Opik can help set up tracing, or instrument your code manually.
connectAgent.helpDescription: Get help from your team or ours. Choose the option that works best for you.

connectToOllie.description: Ollie is Opik’s AI coding assistant. When you connect your repo, Ollie can inspect your code, help add Opik tracing, and guide you through setup.
connectToOllie.waitingForRepo: Waiting for your repo to connect…
connectToOllie.connectedDescription: Ollie can now inspect your code and help you set up tracing in Opik.
connectToOllie.notConnectedDescription: Run the command above in your repo. Once connected, Ollie can inspect your code and help finish setup.

demoLoading.takingLonger: Demo data is taking longer than expected.

selectIntent.welcome: Welcome to Opik - let’s get you set up
selectIntent.hasAgent: I have an AI agent or LLM app
selectIntent.hasAgentDescription: Connect it and track exactly what your agent does on every run.
selectIntent.noAgent: I don’t have an AI agent yet
